div.head: The High Commissioner in Haiti (Russell) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Port au Prince, December 14, 1922—noon.
[Received December 16—11:25 a.m.]

div.p: 160. Department’s 125, December 13th, 6 p.m.Not printed. President Borno has issued arrêté under date December 11th, organizing Claims Commission composed of Léger, Stanley, and Saavedra for the verification and liquidation of the floating debt and all pecuniary claims against Haiti. The third member Mr. Saavedra to be replaced by French, British and Italian delegates whose names appear in arrêté.René Delage, W. Briscoe, and Oscar Scarpa, respectively.
